meta.strategy: Hold VOO; on each 5%-from-peak dip rotate into the best-indicator mega-cap, return to VOO when it recovers to a new high — capped at 5 trades/year.

recommendation.note: In VOO — waiting for the next 5%-from-peak dip to rotate into the best-indicator mega-cap.
Trend (vs 50d), 20/50 cross, 1-mo & 12-mo momentum, and RSI score each mega-cap; highest wins.
At most 5 switches per calendar year keeps slippage and taxes low; rides the rest out.
